Connect your data folder to begin
Display:
📁 Upload Consolidated Workbook

Upload the monthly Consolidated FIP workbook (.xlsx). The dashboard will parse it and refresh all views automatically.

e.g. 2026-03 for March 2026 · 2026-04 for April 2026
📁
Click to choose .xlsx file
or drag-and-drop here
Settings

Root Upload folder — must contain Wix.com/Payment/ and Wix.com/Order/ subfolders. Saving will re-parse all data with the new path.

FX Rates (1 MYR = X)

Click Connect Data Folder to load your data.

Point to your Upload/ folder — all files are read locally.
Your data never leaves your device.
